title: Work Execution Unit
description: Operational work ledger. Each record represents a governed unit of work (e.g., implement feature, deploy service, fix bug, execute script). Layer 52 in the EVA data model architecture.

project_id.description: Foreign key to L25 projects layer

wbs_id.description: Foreign key to L26 wbs layer. Work breakdown structure element.

sprint_id.description: Foreign key to L27 sprints layer. Sprint this work belongs to.

title.description: Brief title of the work unit

status.description: Current execution status of this work unit

assigned_to_type.description: Type of actor assigned to this work

assigned_to_id.description: Polymorphic FK: agent_id (L9), cp_agent_id (L15), or persona_id (L2)

milestone_id.description: Foreign key to L28 milestones layer

workflow_id.description: Foreign key to L18 cp_workflows layer. Governing workflow.

project_work_id.description: Foreign key to L34 project_work layer. Session-level container.

parent_work_unit_id.description: Self-referencing FK. Parent work unit if this is a sub-task.

depends_on.description: Array of work_unit_ids this work depends on

instruction_type.description: How this work should be executed

instruction_payload.description: Freeform execution instructions (parsed by agent or automation)

policy_refs.description: Array of policy_ids from L16 cp_policies layer

evidence_ids.description: Array of evidence_ids from L31 evidence layer

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when work unit was created

duration_seconds.description: Total elapsed time from start to completion

error_message.description: Error details if status is failed
